ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.4 (3.10.0-693.2.2.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 6.9 (2.6.32-696.10.3.el6) *RHEL 7.4 (3.10.0-693.2.2.el7) *SLES12 SP2 (4.4.74-92.35) *Ubuntu 16.04 (4.4.0-71) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.42.13.wc6 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.9.X == Issues fixed between 2.10.0 and 2.10.1 == '''Improvements '''
*[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7899 LU-7899]: osd_xattr_set() to batch actual EA update *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8275 LU-8275]: ssk: add flag to test suite to enable ssk for tests *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8618 LU-8618]: ha.sh improvements *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8619 LU-8619]: Lustre to build against ZFS 0.7.0 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9183 LU-9183]: Support for linux 4.9 kernels *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9494 LU-9494]: Improve message for skipping tests *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9716 LU-9716]: osc_extent_tree_dump0() implementation is suboptimal *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9775 LU-9775]: find kernel-devel even if the current kernel is not installed in the build root *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9776 LU-9776]: lustre-client cannot be installed if both client and server repos are configured *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9781 LU-9781]: Improve catalog full warning in llog_cat_new_log *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9816 LU-9816]: kernel upgrade [RHEL7.4 3.10.0-693.el7] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9850 LU-9850]: the patchless client should not allow the patched kernel to satisfy it's dependencies *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9866 LU-9866]: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.74-92.35] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9890 LU-9890]: osd-zfs: ZFS dmu_objset_own and dmu_objset_disown interface changes *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9907 LU-9907]: lbuild to support patchless server *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9979 LU-9979]: kernel update [RHEL6.9 2.6.32-696.10.2.el6] '''Bugs '''
*[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-282 LU-282]: Some tests in the framework do not properly mark their beginning and end. For example test_27b in sanity. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7372 LU-7372]: replay-dual test_26: test failed to respond and timed out *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8062 LU-8062]: recovery-small test_115b: @@@@@@ FAIL: dd success *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8703 LU-8703]: rework CPU partition code *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8760 LU-8760]: sanity-lfsck test 31g hung *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8885 LU-8885]: zconf_mount_clients() defect *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8935 LU-8935]: "Lustre mount re-export via NFS long timeouts *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8958 LU-8958]: remove code left unused after lloop removal *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9104 LU-9104]: Unknown config param in llog fails mounting target *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9203 LU-9203]: parallel-scale-nfsv3 test_compilebench: MDS hit BUG: unable to handle kernel paging request *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9219 LU-9219]: conf-sanity test_56: failed with timeout *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9235 LU-9235]: LNet: Service thread pid 13033 was inactive for 0.00s. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9266 LU-9266]: Mount hung due to double HSM RESTORE records *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9345 LU-9345]: tests: sanity-hsm: test_29d: hsm_remove needs --mntpath for deleted files *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9364 LU-9364]: replay-vbr test_1c: FAIL: fre0215 : Can not get multiop_pid from /tmp/multiop_bg.pid.30961 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9410 LU-9410]: on-disk bitmap corrupted *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9442 LU-9442]: OST unable to precreate new objects after reaching 0xFFFFFFFF *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9499 LU-9499]: sanity-lfsck test_18f: @@@@@@ FAIL: (2) MDS3 is not the expected 'partial' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9500 LU-9500]: MOFED 4/mlx5: Aligning non-aligned page addresses trigger dump_cqe *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9505 LU-9505]: lfs changelog fails for MDT index containing numerals [A-F] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9514 LU-9514]: sanity test 51f times out due to out of memory *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9545 LU-9545]: "report inconsistent instead of ""fixed"" for LFSCK dry runs" *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9597 LU-9597]: "sanity-quota test_33: 'Used space for project 1000:18432 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9654 LU-9654]: fix problem of Remove Archive on Last Unlink policy *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9671 LU-9671]: Group quota not enforced on clients with mapped GID *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9683 LU-9683]: Negative value reported for req_waittime mdt stat *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9710 LU-9710]: adjust barrier_stat input and output format *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9725 LU-9725]: Mount commands don't return for targets in LFS with DNE and 3 MDTs *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9728 LU-9728]: out of memory on OSS causing allocation failures or hung threads *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9729 LU-9729]: "missing mutex unlock in lnet_dyn_add_net()" *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9731 LU-9731]: kmods need to be limited to EL minor release kernel *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9740 LU-9740]: Most of OSTs remounted read-only due to abort transaction in __ldiskfs_handle_dirty_metadata *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9744 LU-9744]: HS_DIRTY/CLF_HSM_DIRTY can be wrongly reported upon HSM action error *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9745 LU-9745]: dkms-lustre does not install all modules on initial autoinstall *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9750 LU-9750]: misc code cleanups in nrs policy code *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9753 LU-9753]: OFD destroy non-orphan OST-object because of overflow *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9758 LU-9758]: configure --disable-test or --disable-iokit fails to build rpms *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9767 LU-9767]: FS name checking got removed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9772 LU-9772]: enable ZFS MMP feature on new zpools *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9778 LU-9778]: ll_read_ahead_pages no longer returns count of pages *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9799 LU-9799]: mount doesn't return an error when failing *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9817 LU-9817]: Multi-Rail Crash on message free *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9826 LU-9826]: conf-sanity: test 32b failed with 1 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9828 LU-9828]: LBUG ASSERTION( desc->bd_nob_transferred == 0 ) failed: *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9841 LU-9841]: 2.10 don't use 4-16MB rpc at all *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9842 LU-9842]: If you disable xattr cache on client and run sanity 102n it will crash the MDS server *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9848 LU-9848]: LBUG: ASSERTION( len >= (24) && (len & 0x7) == 0 ) failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9856 LU-9856]: NULL pointer dereference in mdd_xattr_list() *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9869 LU-9869]: fix incorrect arguments order calling lstcon_session_new *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9960 LU-9960]: Rolling downgrade master to 2.10 - unable to import zpools '''Technical Tasks'''
*[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9347 LU-9347]: Getting BLKSSZGET using ioctl [[Category:Releases]]
